sys_script_include.description:
2025-01-22 Code Search DEPRECATED: Replaced Intrux Code Search Application THIS FILE WILL SOON BE DELETED
Entry point for handling: - "find references" - code search itself - code search config: generate config for {all|metadata|custom} search
sys_script_include.name: CodeSearchUtilClient
